top_patterns.description: Short, direct statements expressing feelings or highlights.
example_quotes: Nothing more beautiful than a snake river cutthroat caught on a spring creek all by yourself.

top_patterns.description: Sharing news or experiences with an invitation or link.
top_patterns.when_it_appears: Captions about events or media appearances
example_quotes: We woke up like this ;) Summit and I chatting with Poppy Harlow on @CNN about the merits of paternity leave!
My @TODAYshow interview about why paternity leave is good for business is now live- check it out through the link in my profile.
Thank you for a wonderful birthday week :)
Thanks to @att , I can get my work done from anywhere.

archetypal_structures.emotional_job: Share personal joy, pride, or reflection
example_quotes: No better feeling in the world than this.

archetypal_structures.emotional_job: Share experiences and feelings about events
example_quotes: Heading up for the fireworks show

language_habits.sentence_length_profile: Mostly short, punchy sentences, often under 10 words
language_habits.line_break_style: Minimal line breaks, often single sentences or brief phrases

example_quotes: No better feeling in the world than this.
My first is such a joy
Fly boarding is the closest thing to the back to the future hovercraft I have ever experienced.  If u have the chance DO IT!
Thanks to @att , I can get my work done from anywhere.
Thanks Rory Sabbatini for my sweet b day present :)

synthesis_notes.what_this_batch_says_about_current_voice: Consistent personal, upbeat, and milestone-focused tone with emphasis on gratitude, experiences, and informal engagement.
synthesis_notes.what_changed_vs_older_voice: Shift toward more emotional, milestone-driven captions rather than purely informational or promotional.
